title: chore: update app metrics 2026-05-24
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, watering the apps and updating the greenhouse metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse metrics accurate and up-to-date without manual intervention.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot watering pixel plants in a greenhouse, representing the automated health checks, with Polly the bee observing and taking notes.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering small code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny clipboard checking off metrics. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering small code-plants in a digital greenhouse.
